title: Analytics - Share Data
scenario: Share Data analytics consent event is logged when user toggles setting in App Settings > General > Account
steps: Go to App Settings → General → Account
Toggle the 'Share Data' switch ON (if not already)
Observe the Firebase dashboard for the 'Share Data' event
Observe the Firebase dashboard again for the 'Share Data' event
expected: The 'Share Data' event is logged to Firebase with the user's consent choice (ON/OFF). The event data includes consent status, screen name, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
